summary: Completed testing of Mandi Accounting Software features: Daily Sales Edit, Party Statement with JV/Adjustments, Balance Sheet with individual names, and CSV Export. All 11 backend tests passed. UI testing confirmed all features working correctly.
test_credentials: None required - app uses MongoDB locally
seed_data_creation: No test data created - used existing Bepaari ID: 4355b776-51ed-48c1-b594-10fbfb19b494 (KISHOR + KAILASH)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) Daily Sales Edit (PUT /api/daily-sales/{id}) - modal opens, fields editable, amounts recalculate correctly. 2) Party Statement includes JV/Adjustments - shows direction (CREDIT/DEBIT), effect description, and amounts. 3) Balance Sheet shows individual Capital/Loans/Amanat names with amounts (MHN for Capital, SHAKIL GHODEGAON for Amanat). 4) Balance Sheet tallies perfectly (diff=0, ₹78,85,496 on both sides). 5) CSV Export includes ADJUSTMENTS (JV) section with headers and summary.

daily_sales_edit.details: PUT /api/daily-sales/{id} works correctly. Updates discount/quantity/rate and recalculates gross_amount and net_amount. Edit modal in UI opens with all fields (Date, Bepaari, Dukandar, Qty, Rate, Discount).

party_statement_with_jv.details: GET /api/party-statement/{type}/{id} returns adjustments array with direction, effect, amount, narration. UI shows 'Adjustments / JV' section with CREDIT/DEBIT badges. Summary includes 'Total Adjustments (JV)'.

balance_sheet_individual_names.details: GET /api/balance-sheet returns capital_list, loans_list, amanat_list with individual investor names and amounts. UI displays names under Capital (MHN) and Amanat (SHAKIL GHODEGAON) sections.

balance_sheet_tallies.details: Balance Sheet difference = 0. Liabilities = Assets = ₹78,85,496. UI shows 'BALANCE SHEET TALLIED' status.

csv_export_with_adjustments.details: GET /api/export/party-statement/{type}/{id} returns CSV with '=== ADJUSTMENTS (JV) ===' section, headers (Date, Direction, Effect, Amount, Narration), and 'Total Adjustments (JV)' in summary.
